D:\Softwares\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\GOMOKU.dir/objects.a
D:\Softwares\msys2\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\GOMOKU.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\GOMOKU.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Softwares\msys2\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\GOMOKU.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o GOMOKU.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libGOMOKU.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\GOMOKU.dir\linkLibs.rsp
